pi_items.source: Confirmed via verifier.py where DASHBOARD_NAME is matched exactly.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic which strictly searches for these exact graph titles.
Matches the explicit role defined in the task.json description.
Derived accurately from the task scenario involving Data Centers, HVAC, and EC2 servers.
Confirmed via verifier.py RESULT_PATH and export_result.sh output file definition.

privileged_info_summary: The task accurately requires the creation of the HVAC Thermal Efficiency dashboard with exact graph titles Raw Thermal Ratio, Smoothed Alerting Signal, and Temperature vs CPU Overlay, checking for the exact metrics and parameters via verifier.py. Real server metric data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset is downloaded directly from GitHub and used to populate the Graphite metrics, confirming that the task operates on actual, non-synthetic infrastructure metrics.
